about.title: About Savi
about.subtitle: Palestinian Vision.. Digital Innovation
about.whoWeAreText: Savi is a Palestinian startup specialized in developing electronic applications and digital marketing solutions. The company was founded with a clear vision: supporting local Palestinian businesses through modern technology and digital innovation.
about.ourMissionText: We strive to develop innovative electronic applications that serve the Palestinian market and support local business growth through advanced digital marketing solutions. We believe that technology can be a bridge to business success and economic growth.
about.ourVisionText: To be the leading company in developing digital solutions in Palestine, and contribute to building a strong digital economy that supports local businesses and opens new horizons for growth and prosperity.
about.feature1Text: We are part of the Palestinian community and deeply understand its needs and challenges, enabling us to provide suitable and effective solutions.
about.feature2Text: We don't charge upfront costs to our clients. We believe in real results and work on a model that ties our success to our clients' success.
about.feature3Text: We use the latest technologies and tools to develop fast, secure, and user-friendly applications.
about.feature4Text: We provide continuous technical support and regular updates to ensure the best performance of our applications.
about.ourStoryText: Savi started as a simple idea: How can we help local restaurants and stores face economic challenges and increase their sales? From this question, the Savi app was born - a digital platform connecting merchants with customers through smart performance-based offers.

saviApp.title: Save More Every Day
saviApp.subtitle: Exclusive deals from your favorite local spots — all in one app.
saviApp.intro: Join thousands of Palestinians who are already saving on food, shopping, and more. One monthly subscription unlocks a world of real discounts.
saviApp.whatIsSaviText: Savi is Palestine's #1 deals app. We've partnered with top local restaurants and shops so you can enjoy exclusive discounts every single day. Pay one small monthly fee and unlock unlimited savings across dozens of verified partners near you.
saviApp.step1Text: Get Savi on iOS or Android in seconds. Sign up with your phone number — no long forms, no hassle.
saviApp.step2Text: Explore exclusive offers from restaurants, cafes, and shops near you. New deals are added every single day.
saviApp.step3Text: Head to the store, flash your deal in the app, and enjoy your discount. It really is that simple.
saviApp.benefit1: Save on every visit — real discounts, not just points
saviApp.benefit2: Discover new restaurants and hidden gems near you
saviApp.benefit3: New deals every day across food, shopping & more
saviApp.benefit4: One simple monthly subscription, unlimited savings
saviApp.benefit5: Verified partner stores you can actually trust
saviApp.benefit6: Works instantly — no printing, no clipping coupons
saviApp.benefit7: Browse deals by location, category, or discount size
saviApp.benefit8: Exclusive member-only offers not available anywhere else
saviApp.reason1Text: Every offer on Savi is exclusive to our members. You won't find these discounts anywhere else.
saviApp.reason2Text: Every partner is handpicked and verified — only real local businesses you can count on.
saviApp.reason3Text: Fresh offers added every day so there's always something new to discover near you.
saviApp.reason4Text: One affordable monthly subscription unlocks all deals, all stores, all the time.
saviApp.testimonial1Text: I've saved hundreds of shekels every month just on lunch. Best app I've ever downloaded.
saviApp.testimonial2Text: Finally discovered so many great places I had no idea existed. The deals are genuinely good.
saviApp.testimonial3Text: Super easy to use. Just show my phone and get the discount. No complications.
saviApp.learnMoreText: Download Savi today and get access to exclusive deals at dozens of local restaurants and shops.
saviApp.partnerStoresSubtitle: A taste of what's available for Savi members
